Hero.body: We are a full-service medical lab providing 24-hour testing for STDs, DNA, COVID-19, Drugs, Basic Wellness, Allergies, Heart Health, Diabetes, and much more.
Hero.subText: Book an appointment at 24-7 Labs, the only 24-hour full-service testing lab in Tampa.
Hero.trustedBy: Trusted by Tampa families and providers

Services.title: 24-Hour Full-Service Testing Available in Tampa
Services.subtitle: From wellness panels to targeted diagnostics, our broad test menu helps you move quickly from uncertainty to clarity with dependable turnaround and private care.

items.title: Drug Screening Tests
items.description: At 24-7 Labs, we offer individual, five, and ten-panel drug screening tests. We also provide DOT and employer testing services. You can expect results within 24-48 hours.

items.title: DNA Testing
items.description: Our DNA tests test for maternity, paternity, grand-paternity, and siblingship. You can use the test results for legal, informational, and immigration purposes. Most lab results are provided within 72 hours.

items.title: STD Testing
items.description: We can test for all common STDs, including herpes, gonorrhea, and chlamydia. Protect yourself and your partners from STDs. Get peace of mind knowing you are taking care of your health by getting your STD test results.

items.title: Covid Tests
items.description: We offer COVID-19 RT-PCR the same day and the next day. Our tests are the quickest way to get results before you need to travel. Protect yourself and your loved ones while keeping your travel plans intact.

items.title: Routine Health Testing
items.description: We also provide routine health tests for your convenience. These tests include diabetes, cancer panels, thyroid checks, and heart health. 24-7 Labs also offers hormone and allergy testing.

items.title: Allergy Testing
items.description: Did you know that more than 50 million people in the United States are affected by allergies? It is time to find out what is making you miserable every day, and get relief.

items.title: Heart Testing
items.description: Cardiovascular disease is known to be the leading cause of death in the United States. The best way to combat heart disease is by being proactive and opting for regular testing.

items.title: Hormone Testing
items.description: Could you be experiencing hormonal imbalances? Mood fluctuations, weight gain, lethargy, and reduced sexual desire can all be signals. Our hormone tests can help identify the root cause.

WhyChoose.title: Why Choose 24-7 Labs for Testing
WhyChoose.subtitle: 24-7 Labs is a 24-hour full-service testing facility in the Tampa area. Our goal is to provide patients with comprehensive medical care in one convenient location.

items.title: AFFORDABLE & HSA ACCEPTED
items.description: Cost effective, quick and accurate results on every test.

items.title: DISCRETE
items.description: 100% confidential. No insurance or doctor script required.

items.title: PRESCRIPTION FOR POSITIVE RESULTS
items.description: Prescription for positive results from expert physicians and doctors.

items.title: QUICK RESULTS
items.description: Results in 24-48 hours for almost every test.

items.title: ONE STOP MARKETPLACE
items.description: One stop shop health testing marketplace.

Process.title: How It Works
Process.subtitle: We designed our appointment process to be fast, discreet, and straightforward. Use our online scheduling tool to book an appointment in minutes.

items.title: Step One: Select Your Date and Time
items.description: Choose a date and time that fits your schedule.

items.title: Step Two: Choose the Location
items.description: Book an appointment at our Tampa, Temple Terrace, or New Port Richey locations.

items.title: Step Three: Pick a Test
items.description: List which test you want to schedule along with any observations or symptoms you are experiencing.

Appointment.title: Schedule an Appointment for Testing in Tampa Today
Appointment.body: Book a same-day appointment for diagnostics testing at a Tampa testing lab today. Our staff is available to help you schedule your appointment or answer your questions.
Appointment.address: 6107 Memorial Hwy, Suite F Tampa, FL

FAQ.title: Frequently Asked Questions
FAQ.subtitle: Answers to common questions about appointments, privacy, testing process, and turnaround times.

itemsLeft.question: How to book an appointment with 24-7 Labs?
itemsLeft.answer: Fill the form at https://24-7labs.com/schedule-appointment/ and book your appointment easily. 24-7 Labs also welcomes walk-in testing.

itemsLeft.question: Is there a consultancy facility available?
itemsLeft.answer: You can book consultation service from the Testing Services tab on the website or directly at https://24-7labs.com/product/booking-consultation/.

itemsLeft.question: Which home kits are you providing?
itemsLeft.answer: At-home chlamydia, herpes, COVID, and HIV testing kits are available, plus additional options for pregnancy, hormones, diabetes, HIV, and thyroid issues.

itemsLeft.question: Is my information kept confidential?
itemsLeft.answer: Your test results conducted, processed, and issued by 24-7 Labs are all 100% confidential.

itemsLeft.question: What types of diagnostic tests are available at your labs?
itemsLeft.answer: 24-7 Labs offers DNA, STD, drug, heart health, and COVID-19 testing, along with allergies, pregnancy, wellness, hormones, menopause, and thyroid panels.

itemsRight.question: What is the whole process of getting tested?
itemsRight.answer: Schedule a test, visit a convenient location, get tested in-lab or via at-home kit, and receive results quickly through email notification.

itemsRight.question: Can I still get COVID-19 even if I am vaccinated?
itemsRight.answer: Yes, COVID-19 remains a real risk. Learn more at https://24-7labs.com/covid-19/.

itemsRight.question: Is a doctor referral required?
itemsRight.answer: No referral or insurance is required for testing at 24-7 Labs.

itemsRight.question: Will I get my test results the same day?
itemsRight.answer: Most results are delivered within 24-48 hours with fast processing.

itemsRight.question: How much time does it take to get COVID-19 test results?
itemsRight.answer: Same-day and next-day options are available at 24-7 Labs testing locations.

AboutPage.heroTitle: Innovative diagnostics built to give people control of their health.
AboutPage.heroBody: 24-7 Labs is part of a new line of healthcare services from 24-7 Laboratory LLC. Our mission is to provide convenient, affordable, and easy-to-understand testing options so patients can make confident wellness decisions.
AboutPage.sectionLabTitle: The lab for your wellness testing needs
AboutPage.sectionLabBody: We provide medical laboratory testing for a broad range of health goals. There are no hidden fees or surprise billing, and we accept HSA/FSA plus select health insurance plans.
serviceHighlights: DNA, Drug, STD, and COVID-19 Testing

whyChooseUs: Provides thousands of medical lab tests in a professional, convenient and cost-effective way.
No long waits, we strive to see patients in 15 minutes or less.
Results in 24 to 48 hours for most tests.
High-quality testing with trained, experienced, and certified staff.

management.marleyBio: Ms. Roldan has dedicated her career to helping patients control their health through convenient and affordable testing options. She helped develop solutions for drug, paternity, legal, and comprehensive wellness testing, and has grown 24-7 Labs across multiple Florida locations.
management.linaresBio: Dr. Linares is board certified in Internal Medicine, Pulmonary Medicine, and Sleep Medicine, with extensive clinical leadership experience in Tampa Bay since 1996. His work spans critical care, preventive medicine, and community health initiatives.

metadata.title: Trust & Standards | 24-7 Labs
metadata.description: Learn what CLIA, CAP, and HIPAA mean in plain language and how 24-7 Labs applies these standards to patient testing and data handling.

TrustStandardsPage.title: CLIA, CAP, and HIPAA explained in plain language.
TrustStandardsPage.body: You'll see terms like CLIA, CAP, and HIPAA across this site. This page explains what they mean in plain language and what they mean for your experience.

standards.title: CLIA-certified labs
standards.description: CLIA is a U.S. lab quality program run under federal oversight. A CLIA-certified lab has to follow validated processes, quality controls, and proficiency checks.
points: Your sample is processed by a lab held to clinical testing quality standards.
Testing methods and quality checks must meet defined requirements.
Results are produced in a regulated clinical-lab environment.

standards.title: CAP-accredited
standards.description: CAP (College of American Pathologists) accreditation is a rigorous, peer-based inspection program used by high-performing clinical laboratories.
points: Labs are inspected against detailed quality and operational standards.
Accreditation is reviewed and maintained through recurring external assessments.
It is an additional quality layer beyond baseline regulatory requirements.

standards.title: HIPAA-compliant
standards.description: HIPAA is a U.S. privacy and security framework for protected health information (PHI). It governs how health-related information is used, disclosed, and protected.
points: Access to PHI is limited to necessary operational and clinical workflows.
Systems must use security controls for storage, transfer, and access.
Privacy practices define how data is used and how users can request support.

metadata.title: COVID-19 Testing Tampa | 24-7 Labs
metadata.description: Same-day and next-day COVID-19 RT-PCR testing in Tampa with fast turnaround, private booking, and travel-ready documentation.

CovidPage.title: COVID-19 Testing
CovidPage.intro1: Whether you're vaccinated and keeping current on boosters or unvaccinated entirely, COVID-19 continues to be a very real risk. 24-7 Labs provides convenient same-day and next-day testing in Tampa, Florida.
CovidPage.intro2: COVID-19 is caused by the SARS-CoV-2 virus and can affect everyone differently. Common symptoms include:
CovidPage.accreditation: 24-7 Labs and all lab partners are accredited by the College of American Pathologists (CAP) and certified under CLIA. You can trust both your testing quality and your privacy.
CovidPage.howTitle: How Does 24-7 Labs COVID-19 Testing Work?
CovidPage.howBody: Our team guides you through a quick nasal swab process. Results can be delivered in as little as 24 hours by email, and we can provide documentation for travel, school, or work when required.
CovidPage.pricingTitle: 24-7 Labs Provides Quick, Affordable COVID-19 Testing
CovidPage.pricingBody: In today's health-conscious environment, COVID-19 testing may be needed for several reasons:
reasons: Are you flying or leaving the country?
Does your child need to return to school?
